## New Entry

**Name:**
**Role:** celebrity / politician / influencer / journalist / other
**Wikipedia/public profile link:**
**Stance:** support / opposition / neutral
**Quote (verbatim, leave blank if no public statement — visited only):**
**Source URL:**
**Timestamp of the statement/post itself (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM, IST):**

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Source URL is public and loads (not paywalled or dead)
- [ ] Quote is verbatim, not paraphrased
- [ ] Stance reflects what the quote actually says, not my interpretation
- [ ] Checked `data/entries/` — this person/date/source isn't already listed (CI also flags likely duplicates automatically)
- [ ] My PR adds exactly one new file under `data/entries/` following the naming format: `YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM_name-slug.json`
